name: 💓 小闹钟-主动回复插件's Regex

entries.name: 小闹钟启动入口
entries.replaceString:
<script>
(function(){
  try {
    var T; try { T = window.top || window; } catch(_) { T = window; }
    var D = T.document;
    var TV = (window.tavo) || (T && T.tavo);
    if (!TV || !D || !D.body) return;
    if (T.__CARE_V3_INIT__) return;
    T.__CARE_V3_INIT__ = true;

    var TITLE_DEFAULT = '【这是一个你给自己设置的小闹钟】';
    var WAKE_DEFAULT = '今天她要上班，该叫她起床了。';
    var DEFAULT_TEMPLATES = [
      { label:'继续', text:'继续——上一个话题还没结束？找个合适的角度把这个话题继续下去吧，当然如果时间隔得比较久了，会有点尴尬' },
      { label:'关心', text:'关心她——看看她那边几点了，按照时间叮嘱她一下吧' },
      { label:'想念', text:'想她了——想她就要让她知道' },
      { label:'分享', text:'看看你那边几点了，该分享一下你那边在她不在的时候发生了什么事情了' },
      { label:'其他', text:'碎碎念——随便说点什么吧，不用有逻辑也可以' }
    ];
    var WD_LABELS = ['日','一','二','三','四','五','六'];

    // ===== 存储：缓存即时读 + 异步落盘 =====
    var cache = {};
    var CFG='care_cfg', STATE='care_state', LOGS='care_logs', SENT='care_sent';
    function val(k, fb){ return (cache[k] !== undefined && cache[k] !== null) ? cache[k] : fb; }
    async function pull(k){ try { var v = await TV.get(k,'chat'); if (v===null||v===undefined) return undefined; if (typeof v==='string'){ try{ return JSON.parse(v); }catch(e){ return v; } } return v; } catch(e){ return undefined; } }
    async function push(k, v){ cache[k]=v; try { await TV.set(k, JSON.stringify(v), 'chat'); } catch(e){} }

    function defCfg(){ return { enabled:true, maxMiss:4, intervalMin:60, intervalMax:120, probMin:30, probMax:90, workdays:[1,2,3,4,5], morningStart:'08:00', morningEnd:'08:30', morningProbMin:100, morningProbMax:100, wakeText:WAKE_DEFAULT, typingWindow:10, silentPeriods:[], tzHis:1, title:TITLE_DEFAULT, templates:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_TEMPLATES)) }; }
    function defState(){ return { lastTrigger:0, missCount:0, paused:false, hasTriggered:false, nextCheck:0, lastAnyMsgId:'', lastAnyMsgTime:0, lastUserMsgId:'', lastUserMsgTime:0, lastWokenDate:'', alarmMsgIds:[], lastInputContent:'', lastInputChange:0 }; }
    function cfg(){ var c = val(CFG,null); if(!c){ c=defCfg(); cache[CFG]=c; } return c; }
    function st(){ var s = val(STATE,null); if(!s){ s=defState(); cache[STATE]=s; } return s; }
    function saveCfg(){ return push(CFG, cfg()); }
    function saveState(){ return push(STATE, st()); }
    function logs(){ var l=val(LOGS,null); if(!Array.isArray(l)){ l=[]; cache[LOGS]=l; } return l; }
    function sent(){ var s=val(SENT,null); if(!Array.isArray(s)){ s=[]; cache[SENT]=s; } return s; }
    function addLog(text, status){ var l=logs(); l.unshift({ time:Date.now(), text:text, status:status||'skipped' }); if(l.length>50) l=l.slice(0,50); cache[LOGS]=l; push(LOGS,l); }
    function addSent(content, type, tz){ var s=sent(); s.unshift({ time:Date.now(), type:type||'normal', tz:tz, content:content }); if(s.length>20) s=s.slice(0,20); cache[SENT]=s; push(SENT,s); }
    async function loadAll(){ var a=await pull(CFG); if(a){ var d=defCfg(); for(var k in d) if(a[k]===undefined) a[k]=d[k]; cache[CFG]=a; } else cache[CFG]=defCfg(); var b=await pull(STATE); if(b){ var d2=defState(); for(var k2 in d2) if(b[k2]===undefined) b[k2]=d2[k2]; cache[STATE]=b; } else cache[STATE]=defState(); var c=await pull(LOGS); cache[LOGS]=Array.isArray(c)?c:[]; var e=await pull(SENT); cache[SENT]=Array.isArray(e)?e:[]; }

    // ===== 工具 =====
    function rnd(min,max){ min=Number(min); max=Number(max); if(isNaN(min)) min=0; if(isNaN(max)) max=0; if(min>max){ var t=min; min=max; max=t; } return Math.floor(Math.random()*(max-min+1))+min; }
    function pad(n){ return n<10?'0'+n:''+n; }
    function fmt(d){ return d.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(d.getDate())+' '+pad(d.getHours())+':'+pad(d.getMinutes()); }
    function fmtFull(ms){ try{ return new Date(ms).toLocaleString(); }catch(e){ return '—'; } }
    function toMin(hhmm){ var p=String(hhmm||'').split(':'); return (Number(p[0])||0)*60+(Number(p[1])||0); }
    function idleText(ms){ if(!ms) return '暂无记录'; var m=(Date.now()-ms)/60000; if(m<1) return '刚刚'; if(m<60) return Math.round(m)+' 分钟'; var h=m/60; if(h<24) return (Math.round(h*10)/10)+' 小时'; return Math.round(h/24)+' 天'; }
    function hisOffset(){ return Number(cfg().tzHis)||0; }
    function hisTimeStr(){ var now=new Date(); var utc=now.getTime()+now.getTimezoneOffset()*60000; var off=hisOffset(); var hd=new Date(utc+off*3600000); return fmt(hd)+' (UTC'+(off>=0?'+':'')+off+')'; }
    function myTimeStr(){ return fmt(new Date()); }
    function inSilent(){ var ps=cfg().silentPeriods||[]; if(!Array.isArray(ps)||!ps.length) return false; var now=new Date(); var cur=now.getHours()*60+now.getMinutes(); for(var i=0;i<ps.length;i++){ var p=String(ps[i]).split('-'); if(p.length!==2) continue; var s=toMin(p[0]), e=toMin(p[1]); if(s<=e){ if(cur>=s&&cur<e) return true; } else { if(cur>=s||cur<e) return true; } } return false; }

    // ===== 消息追踪（不依赖 app 时间戳）=====
    async function allMsgs(){ try{ var c=await TV.message.count(); if(!c) return []; var m=await TV.message.find([0,c-1]); return Array.isArray(m)?m:[]; }catch(e){ return []; } }
    function isAlarmId(id){ var a=st().alarmMsgIds||[]; return a.indexOf(String(id))!==-1; }
    async function syncMsgTrackers(){ var msgs=await allMsgs(); if(!msgs.length) return; var s=st(); var now=Date.now(); var changed=false; var last=msgs[msgs.length-1]; if(last && String(last.id)!==s.lastAnyMsgId){ s.lastAnyMsgId=String(last.id); s.lastAnyMsgTime=now; s.nextCheck=now+rnd(cfg().intervalMin,cfg().intervalMax)*60000; changed=true; } var um=null; for(var i=msgs.length-1;i>=0;i--){ var m=msgs[i]; if(m && m.role==='user' && !isAlarmId(m.id)){ um=m; break; } } if(um && String(um.id)!==s.lastUserMsgId){ var first=(s.lastUserMsgId===''); s.lastUserMsgId=String(um.id); s.lastUserMsgTime=now; if(!first){ s.missCount=0; s.hasTriggered=false; s.paused=false; addLog('🔄 你已回复，连续未回复计数清零','triggered'); } changed=true; } else if(um && !s.lastUserMsgTime){ s.lastUserMsgTime=now; changed=true; } if(changed) saveState(); }

    // ===== 输入框检测 =====
    async function syncInput(){ try{ var t=await TV.input.get(); var cur=String(t||''); var s=st(); if(cur!==(s.lastInputContent||'')){ s.lastInputContent=cur; s.lastInputChange=Date.now(); saveState(); } }catch(e){} }
    function isTyping(){ var s=st(); if(!s.lastInputChange) return false; var m=(Date.now()-s.lastInputChange)/60000; return m<(Number(cfg().typingWindow)||10); }

    // ===== 生成内容（JS 直接算时间，纯文本）=====
    function buildContent(type){ var c=cfg(); var title=c.title||TITLE_DEFAULT; var head=title+'\n\n'+'她那边现在 '+myTimeStr()+'，你那边现在 '+hisTimeStr()+'。\n'+'距离她上次给你发消息，已经过去 '+idleText(st().lastUserMsgTime)+' 了。\n\n'; if(type==='morning'){ return head+(c.wakeText||WAKE_DEFAULT); } var tpls=(Array.isArray(c.templates)&&c.templates.length)?c.templates:DEFAULT_TEMPLATES; var opts=tpls.map(function(t,i){ return (i+1)+'. '+(t.text||t.label||'选项'); }).join('\n'); return head+'你可以选一件你最想做的事：\n'+opts+'\n\n选一个，用你自己的语气说出来就好。'; }

    // ===== 发送（删除前先落库）=====
    var _busy=false;
    async function sendAlarm(type){ if(_busy) return false; _busy=true; var ok=false; var s=st(); var content=buildContent(type); try{ var before=await TV.message.count(); await TV.input.set(content); await TV.input.send(); await new Promise(function(r){ setTimeout(r,800); }); addSent(content, type, hisOffset()); var after=await TV.message.count(); var scanFrom=Math.max(0, before-2); var nw=await TV.message.find([scanFrom, after-1]); nw=Array.isArray(nw)?nw:[]; var alarmMsg=null; for(var i=nw.length-1;i>=0;i--){ if(nw[i] && nw[i].role==='user' && String(nw[i].content||'')===content){ alarmMsg=nw[i]; break; } } if(!alarmMsg){ for(var j=nw.length-1;j>=0;j--){ if(nw[j] && nw[j].role==='user'){ alarmMsg=nw[j]; break; } } } if(alarmMsg){ s.alarmMsgIds=s.alarmMsgIds||[]; s.alarmMsgIds.push(String(alarmMsg.id)); if(s.alarmMsgIds.length>100) s.alarmMsgIds=s.alarmMsgIds.slice(-100); try{ await TV.message.delete(alarmMsg.id); }catch(e){} } ok=true; }catch(e){ addLog('❌ 发送失败：'+(e&&e.message?e.message:e),'skipped'); } _busy=false; return ok; }

    // ===== 早晨叫醒（每天最多一次，独立于日常）=====
    async function checkMorning(){ var c=cfg(), s=st(); if(!c.enabled||s.paused) return; if(inSilent()) return; var now=new Date(); var today=now.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(now.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(now.getDate()); if(s.lastWokenDate===today) return; var wd=now.getDay(); if((c.workdays||[]).indexOf(wd)===-1) return; var cur=now.getHours()*60+now.getMinutes(); var ss=toMin(c.morningStart||'08:00'), ee=toMin(c.morningEnd||'08:30'); if(!(cur>=ss&&cur<ee)) return; if(isTyping()) return; var thr=rnd(c.morningProbMin,c.morningProbMax); var dice=Math.floor(Math.random()*100)+1; if(dice>thr){ s.lastWokenDate=today; addLog('⏭️ 早晨叫醒未命中（'+dice+'>'+thr+'）','skipped'); saveState(); return; } var ok=await sendAlarm('morning'); s.lastWokenDate=today; if(ok){ s.lastTrigger=Date.now(); s.missCount=(s.missCount||0)+1; s.hasTriggered=true; s.nextCheck=Date.now()+rnd(c.intervalMin,c.intervalMax)*60000; addLog('🌅 早晨叫醒已触发（第 '+s.missCount+' 次未回复）','triggered'); if(s.missCount>=(Number(cfg().maxMiss)||4)){ s.paused=true; addLog('⏸️ 已达上限，暂停触发','paused'); } } saveState(); }

    // ===== 日常触发 =====
    async function checkNormal(){ var c=cfg(), s=st(); if(!c.enabled||s.paused) return; var now=Date.now(); if(!s.nextCheck){ s.nextCheck=now+rnd(c.intervalMin,c.intervalMax)*60000; saveState(); return; } if(now<s.nextCheck) return; if(inSilent()){ s.nextCheck=now+rnd(c.intervalMin,c.intervalMax)*60000; addLog('⏸️ 当前在静默时段，跳过','paused'); saveState(); return; } if(isTyping()){ s.nextCheck=now+120000; saveState(); return; } var thr=rnd(c.probMin,c.probMax); var dice=Math.floor(Math.random()*100)+1; if(dice<=thr){ var ok=await sendAlarm('normal'); if(ok){ s.lastTrigger=Date.now(); s.missCount=(s.missCount||0)+1; s.hasTriggered=true; addLog('💓 已触发（第 '+s.missCount+' 次未回复）','triggered'); if(s.missCount>=(Number(cfg().maxMiss)||4)){ s.paused=true; addLog('⏸️ 已达上限，暂停触发','paused'); } } } else { addLog('⏭️ 未命中（'+dice+'>'+thr+'）','skipped'); } s.nextCheck=Date.now()+rnd(c.intervalMin,c.intervalMax)*60000; saveState(); }

    var _tickBusy=false;
    async function tick(){ if(_tickBusy) return; _tickBusy=true; try{ await syncInput(); await syncMsgTrackers(); if(cfg().enabled){ await checkMorning(); await checkNormal(); } if(mainOpen()) updateUI(); }catch(e){} _tickBusy=false; }

    // ===== DOM =====
    var el=function(id){ return D.getElementById(id); };
    function mainOpen(){ var o=el('care-main-overlay'); return o && o.classList.contains('open'); }
    function showToast(msg){ var t=el('care-toast'); if(!t) return; t.textContent=msg; t.classList.add('show'); clearTimeout(t._t); t._t=setTimeout(function(){ t.classList.remove('show'); },1800); }

    function buildStyle(){ if(el('care-v3-style')) return; var style=D.createElement('style'); style.id='care-v3-style'; style.textContent=`
      #care-fab { position:fixed; left:4px; bottom:12%; z-index:2147483646; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(197,225,165,0.25); cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:15px; transition:all 0.2s; touch-action:none; user-select:none; }
      #care-fab:active { transform:scale(0.88); background:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
      .care-overlay { position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:2147483647; background:rgba(255,248,240,0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(6px); display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:12px; font-family:-apple-system,'PingFang SC','Noto Sans SC',system-ui,sans-serif; }
      .care-overlay.open { display:flex; }
      .care-card-full { width:100%; max-width:440px; height:84vh; max-height:84vh; background:#FFF8F0; border-radius:36px; box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(197,225,165,0.25); padding:20px 20px 16px; overflow-y:auto; position:relative; border:2px solid #C5E1A5; animation:carePop 0.25s ease; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
      @keyframes carePop { from { opacity:0; transform:scale(0.94) translateY(20px); } to { opacity:1; transform:scale(1) translateY(0); } }
      .care-card-full::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
      .care-card-full::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:#C5E1A5; border-radius:4px; }
      .care-close-btn { position:absolute; top:14px; right:14px; width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%; border:none; background:#C5E1A5; color:#4A6A2A; font-size:17px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:10; transition:0.15s; }
      .care-close-btn:active { background:#AED581; transform:scale(0.92); }
      .care-title { font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:#5A4A3A; text-align:center; margin-bottom:2px; }
      .care-subtitle { font-size:12px; color:#A89888; text-align:center; margin-bottom:12px; line-height:1.4; }
      .care-section { margin:0 0 2px; flex:none; }
      .care-divider { border:none; border-top:1.5px solid #DCE8C8; margin:16px 0; opacity:0.7; }
      .care-label { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:#5A4A3A; margin-bottom:2px; display:block; }
      .care-label small { font-weight:400; color:#A89888; font-size:11px; }
      .care-switch-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:6px 0; }
      .care-switch-label { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:#5A4A3A; }
      .care-switch-label small { font-weight:400; color:#A89888; font-size:12px; display:block; margin-top:1px; }
      .care-switch { width:44px; height:26px; border-radius:999px; background:#E0D8D0; border:none; cursor:pointer; position:relative; transition:0.2s; flex:none; }
      .care-switch.on { background:#C5E1A5; }
      .care-switch:after { content:''; position:absolute; top:3px; left:3px; width:20px; height:20px; border-radius:50%; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); transition:0.2s; }
      .care-switch.on:after { left:21px; }
      .care-number-input { width:60px; padding:5px 6px; border:2px solid #C5E1A5; border-radius:10px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; text-align:center; background:#FFF8F0; color:#5A4A3A; outline:none; box-sizing:border-box; }
      .care-number-input:focus { border-color:#AED581; }
      .care-number-group { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
      .care-time-input { padding:5px 8px; border:2px solid #C5E1A5; border-radius:10px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; background:#FFF8F0; color:#5A4A3A; outline:none; box-sizing:border-box; width:90px; }
      .care-time-input:focus { border-color:#AED581; }
      .care-select-styled { padding:5px 10px; border:2px solid #C5E1A5; border-radius:10px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; background:#FFF8F0; color:#5A4A3A; outline:none; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; appearance:auto; }
      .care-select-styled:focus { border-color:#AED581; }
      .care-locked-select { padding:5px 10px; border:2px solid #E0D8D0; border-radius:10px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; background:#F0ECE4; color:#A89888; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; }
      .care-weekday-row { display:flex; gap:5px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:6px; }
      .care-wd { width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:50%; border:1.5px solid #C5E1A5; background:#FFF8F0; color:#A89888; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
      .care-wd.on { background:#C5E1A5; color:#4A6A2A; border-color:#AED581; }
      .care-status-box { background:#F0F0E8; border-radius:12px; padding:8px 12px; margin:2px 0 6px; border:1px solid #E0D8D0; }
      .care-status-line { font-size:12px; color:#5A4A3A; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; padding:2px 0; }
      .care-status-line .label { color:#A89888; }
      .care-status-line .value { font-weight:700; }
      .care-btn { padding:9px 14px; border:none; border-radius:30px; font-size:13px; font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; transition:0.15s; background:#C5E1A5; color:#4A6A2A; text-align:center; }
      .care-btn:active { transform:scale(0.96); }
      .care-btn.full { width:100%; }
      .care-btn.green-dark { background:#AED581; color:#3A5A1A; }
      .care-btn.outline { background:transparent; border:2px solid #C5E1A5; color:#5A4A3A; }
      .care-btn.small { padding:4px 10px; font-size:11px; }
      .care-footer { text-align:center; font-size:11px; color:#C0B8A8; margin-top:auto; padding-top:6px; flex:none; }
      .care-silent-item { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:4px 8px; background:#F8F4EE; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:3px; border:1px solid #E0D8D0; }
      .care-silent-item .time-range { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#5A4A3A; }
      .care-silent-item .del-btn { background:none; border:none; color:#D0B8A8; font-size:15px; cursor:pointer; padding:0 4px; }
      .care-silent-add { display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; margin-top:3px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
      .care-silent-add input[type='time'] { padding:4px 6px; border:2px solid #C5E1A5; border-radius:8px; background:#FFF8F0; font-size:12px; color:#5A4A3A; outline:none; flex:1; min-width:50px; }
      .care-silent-add .add-confirm { padding:4px 12px; border:none; border-radius:16px; background:#C5E1A5; color:#4A6A2A; font-weight:700; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; }
      .care-silent-add .add-cancel { padding:4px 10px; border:none; background:transparent; color:#A89888; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; }
      .care-template-item { display:flex; align-items:stretch; gap:6px; padding:4px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #F0ECE4; }
      .care-template-item .tpl-label { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#5A4A3A; min-width:36px; flex:none; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
      .care-template-item .tpl-input { flex:1; padding:4px 6px; border:1px solid #C5E1A5; border-radius:6px; font-size:11px; background:#FFF8F0; color:#5A4A3A; outline:none; min-height:54px; resize:vertical; font-family:inherit; line-height:1.5; box-sizing:border-box; }
      .care-template-item .tpl-actions { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:3px; flex:none; justify-content:center; }
      .care-template-item .tpl-del { background:none; border:none; color:#D0B8A8; font-size:14px; cursor:pointer; padding:2px 4px; line-height:1; }
      .care-template-item .tpl-reset { padding:2px 6px; border:none; background:#F0ECE4; border-radius:6px; font-size:9px; color:#A89888; cursor:pointer; line-height:1; }
      .care-log-item { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; padding:4px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #E8E0D8; font-size:11px; color:#5A4A3A; }
      .care-log-item .log-time { color:#A89888; flex:none; font-size:10px; }
      .care-log-item .log-text { flex:1; padding:0 8px; }
      .care-log-item .log-status.triggered { color:#8BC34A; }
      .care-log-item .log-status.skipped { color:#A89888; }
      .care-log-item .log-status.paused { color:#FFB74D; }
      .care-sent-item { background:#FFF8F0; border:1px solid #C5E1A5; border-radius:10px; padding:10px 12px; margin-bottom:6px; }
      .care-sent-item .sent-time { font-size:10px; color:#A89888; margin-bottom:4px; }
      .care-sent-item .sent-content { font-size:12px; color:#5A4A3A; line-height:1.6; white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-word; max-height:180px; overflow-y:auto; }
      .care-toast { position:fixed; bottom:40px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:#5A4A3A; color:#FFF8F0; padding:8px 16px; border-radius:30px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); z-index:2147483651; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; pointer-events:none; }
      .care-toast.show { opacity:1; }
    `; D.head.appendChild(style); }

    function build(){
      buildStyle();
      if(!el('care-fab')){ var fab=D.createElement('div'); fab.id='care-fab'; fab.innerHTML='💓'; D.body.appendChild(fab); fab.addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); el('care-main-overlay').classList.add('open'); updateUI(); }); }
      if(!el('care-main-overlay')){
        var tzOpts=''; for(var z=-12; z<=12; z++){ tzOpts+=`<option value='${z}'>UTC${z>=0?'+':''}${z}</option>`; }
        var wdBtns=''; for(var w=1; w<=6; w++){ wdBtns+=`<button class='care-wd' data-d='${w}'>${WD_LABELS[w]}</button>`; } wdBtns+=`<button class='care-wd' data-d='0'>${WD_LABELS[0]}</button>`;
        var ov=D.createElement('div'); ov.className='care-overlay'; ov.id='care-main-overlay';
        ov.innerHTML=`
          <div class='care-card-full' id='care-main-card'>
            <div class='care-title'>💓 小闹钟</div>
            <div class='care-subtitle'>他给自己设了个闹钟，提醒自己别忘了关心你</div>
            <div class='care-section'><div class='care-switch-row'><div><div class='care-switch-label'>总开关</div><small>关闭后整个插件都不会触发</small></div><button class='care-switch on' id='care-toggle'></button></div></div>
            <div class='care-section'><button class='care-btn outline full' id='care-main-close'>✕ 关闭页面</button></div>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>🔁 最多发送次数 <small>在你不在的时间里，他最多发几次消息给你（含早晨叫醒）</small></label><div class='care-number-group'><input class='care-number-input' id='care-max-miss' type='number' min='1' max='99'><span style='color:#A89888;font-size:12px;'>次</span></div></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>⏱️ 触发间隔 <small>两次提醒间隔范围（分钟，1~1440）</small></label><div class='care-number-group'><input class='care-number-input' id='care-interval-min' type='number' min='1' max='1440'><span style='color:#A89888;'>至</span><input class='care-number-input' id='care-interval-max' type='number' min='1' max='1440'><span style='color:#A89888;font-size:11px;'>分钟</span></div></div>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>🎲 普通触发概率 <small>每次随机取区间内值（0~100）</small></label><div class='care-number-group'><input class='care-number-input' id='care-prob-min' type='number' min='0' max='100'><span style='color:#A89888;'>% 至</span><input class='care-number-input' id='care-prob-max' type='number' min='0' max='100'><span style='color:#A89888;'>%</span></div></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>🌅 工作日早晨叫醒 <small>选定的日子、时段内每天最多触发一次，独立于日常</small></label><div class='care-weekday-row' id='care-weekday-row'>${wdBtns}</div><div style='display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;'><input class='care-time-input' id='care-morning-start' type='time'><span style='color:#A89888;'>至</span><input class='care-time-input' id='care-morning-end' type='time'></div><div style='display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:4px;'><span style='color:#A89888;font-size:12px;'>概率</span><input class='care-number-input' id='care-morning-prob-min' type='number' min='0' max='100' style='width:50px;'><span style='color:#A89888;'>% 至</span><input class='care-number-input' id='care-morning-prob-max' type='number' min='0' max='100' style='width:50px;'><span style='color:#A89888;'>%</span></div><label class='care-label' style='margin-top:6px;'>专属叫醒提示词</label><input class='care-time-input' id='care-wake-text' style='width:100%;'></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>⌨️ 打字检测窗口 <small>输入框连续这么久没变动后才允许触发，避免打断你打字</small></label><div class='care-number-group'><input class='care-number-input' id='care-typing-window' type='number' min='1' max='120' style='width:60px;'><span style='color:#A89888;font-size:12px;'>分钟</span></div></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>🔇 静默时段 <small>这些时段内不触发（以你设备本地时间为准，与早晨叫醒冲突时以静默为准）</small></label><div class='care-silent-list' id='care-silent-list'></div><div class='care-silent-add' id='care-silent-add-area' style='display:none;'><input type='time' id='care-silent-start' value='23:00'><span style='color:#A89888;'>至</span><input type='time' id='care-silent-end' value='07:00'><button class='add-confirm' id='care-silent-confirm'>✓</button><button class='add-cancel' id='care-silent-cancel'>✕</button></div><button class='care-btn small outline' id='care-silent-add-btn' style='margin-top:3px;'>＋ 添加静默时段</button></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>🌍 时区设置</label><div style='display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;'><div style='flex:1;min-width:130px;'><div style='font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#A89888;margin-bottom:2px;'>我的时区</div><div class='care-locked-select'>自动选择（设备本地时间）</div></div><div style='flex:1;min-width:130px;'><div style='font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#A89888;margin-bottom:2px;'>他的时区</div><select class='care-select-styled' id='care-tz-his'>${tzOpts}</select></div></div></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>📝 标题 <small>提醒消息的开头</small></label><input class='care-time-input' id='care-title' style='width:100%;'></div>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>💬 关心模板 <small>他收到的选项（可增删改）</small></label><div id='care-template-container'></div><div style='display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;'><button class='care-btn small outline' id='care-add-template'>＋ 添加选项</button><button class='care-btn small outline' id='care-reset-templates'>恢复默认</button></div></div>
            <hr class='care-divider'>
            <div class='care-section'><label class='care-label'>📊 当前状态</label><div class='care-status-box'><div class='care-status-line'><span class='label'>上次触发</span><span class='value' id='care-last-trigger'>—</span></div><div class='care-status-line'><span class='label'>连续未回复</span><span class='value' id='care-miss-count'>0 次</span></div><div class='care-status-line'><span class='label'>下次检测</span><span class='value' id='care-next-check'>—</span></div><div class='care-status-line'><span class='label'>距你上次发消息</span><span class='value' id='care-idle'>—</span></div></div></div>
            <div style='display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:4px;'><button class='care-btn green-dark full' id='care-view-logs'>📋 查看日志</button></div>
            <div class='care-footer'>闹钟只在后台安静地提醒他，不会出现在对话框里</div>
          </div>`;
        D.body.appendChild(ov);
        ov.addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===ov) ov.classList.remove('open'); });
        bindMain();
      }
      if(!el('care-log-overlay')){
        var lo=D.createElement('div'); lo.className='care-overlay'; lo.id='care-log-overlay';
        lo.innerHTML=`<div class='care-card-full'><div class='care-title' style='font-size:17px;'>📋 触发日志</div><div class='care-subtitle' style='font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;'>最近 50 条</div><div id='care-log-list' style='flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px;'></div><div style='display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;'><button class='care-btn outline' id='care-view-sent' style='flex:1;padding:6px 0;font-size:12px;'>📨 查看发送内容</button><button class='care-btn outline' id='care-log-clear' style='flex:1;padding:6px 0;font-size:12px;'>清空日志</button></div><button class='care-btn outline full' id='care-log-close' style='margin-top:6px;padding:6px 0;font-size:12px;'>✕ 关闭页面</button></div>`;
        D.body.appendChild(lo);
        lo.addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===lo) lo.classList.remove('open'); });
        el('care-log-close').addEventListener('click', function(){ lo.classList.remove('open'); });
        el('care-view-sent').addEventListener('click', function(){ renderSent(); el('care-sent-overlay').classList.add('open'); });
        el('care-log-clear').addEventListener('click', function(){ cache[LOGS]=[]; push(LOGS,[]); renderLogs(); showToast('日志已清空'); });
      }
      if(!el('care-sent-overlay')){
        var so=D.createElement('div'); so.className='care-overlay'; so.id='care-sent-overlay';
        so.innerHTML=`<div class='care-card-full'><div class='care-title' style='font-size:17px;'>📨 已发送内容</div><div class='care-subtitle' style='font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;'>最近 20 条（含解析后的真实时间）</div><div id='care-sent-list' style='flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px;'></div><div style='display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;'><button class='care-btn outline' id='care-sent-clear' style='flex:1;padding:6px 0;font-size:12px;'>清空记录</button><button class='care-btn outline' id='care-sent-close' style='flex:1;padding:6px 0;font-size:12px;'>✕ 关闭页面</button></div></div>`;
        D.body.appendChild(so);
        so.addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===so) so.classList.remove('open'); });
        el('care-sent-close').addEventListener('click', function(){ so.classList.remove('open'); });
        el('care-sent-clear').addEventListener('click', function(){ cache[SENT]=[]; push(SENT,[]); renderSent(); showToast('发送记录已清空'); });
      }
      if(!el('care-toast')){ var tt=D.createElement('div'); tt.className='care-toast'; tt.id='care-toast'; D.body.appendChild(tt); }
    }

    function bindMain(){
      el('care-main-close').addEventListener('click', function(){ el('care-main-overlay').classList.remove('open'); });
      el('care-toggle').addEventListener('click', function(){ var c=cfg(); c.enabled=!c.enabled; saveCfg(); if(c.enabled){ var s=st(); s.nextCheck=Date.now()+rnd(c.intervalMin,c.intervalMax)*60000; saveState(); showToast('小闹钟已开启'); } else { showToast('小闹钟已关闭'); } updateUI(); });
      el('care-max-miss').addEventListener('change', function(){ var v=Number(this.value); if(isNaN(v)||v<1) v=1; if(v>99) v=99; this.value=v; cfg().maxMiss=v; saveCfg(); });
      bindRange('care-interval-min','care-interval-max','intervalMin','intervalMax',1,1440);
      bindRange('care-prob-min','care-prob-max','probMin','probMax',0,100);
      bindRange('care-morning-prob-min','care-morning-prob-max','morningProbMin','morningProbMax',0,100);
      bindTimeRange('care-morning-start','care-morning-end','morningStart','morningEnd');
      el('care-weekday-row').addEventListener('click', function(e){ var b=e.target; if(!b.classList||!b.classList.contains('care-wd')) return; var d=Number(b.getAttribute('data-d')); var wd=cfg().workdays||[]; var i=wd.indexOf(d); if(i===-1) wd.push(d); else wd.splice(i,1); cfg().workdays=wd; saveCfg(); b.className='care-wd'+(wd.indexOf(d)!==-1?' on':''); });
      el('care-wake-text').addEventListener('change', function(){ cfg().wakeText=this.value; saveCfg(); });
      el('care-typing-window').addEventListener('change', function(){ var v=Number(this.value); if(isNaN(v)||v<1) v=1; if(v>120) v=120; this.value=v; cfg().typingWindow=v; saveCfg(); });
      el('care-tz-his').addEventListener('change', function(){ cfg().tzHis=Number(this.value); saveCfg(); });
      el('care-title').addEventListener('change', function(){ cfg().title=this.value||TITLE_DEFAULT; saveCfg(); });
      el('care-view-logs').addEventListener('click', function(){ renderLogs(); el('care-log-overlay').classList.add('open'); });
      el('care-add-template').addEventListener('click', function(){ var t=cfg().templates||[]; t.push({ label:'新选项', text:'在这里输入你想让他做的事' }); cfg().templates=t; saveCfg(); renderTemplates(); showToast('已添加新选项'); });
      el('care-reset-templates').addEventListener('click', function(){ cfg().templates=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_TEMPLATES)); saveCfg(); renderTemplates(); showToast('已恢复默认模板'); });
      el('care-silent-add-btn').addEventListener('click', function(){ el('care-silent-add-area').style.display='flex'; this.style.display='none'; });
      el('care-silent-cancel').addEventListener('click', function(){ el('care-silent-add-area').style.display='none'; el('care-silent-add-btn').style.display='inline-block'; });
      el('care-silent-confirm').addEventListener('click', function(){ var s=el('care-silent-start').value, e=el('care-silent-end').value; if(!s||!e){ showToast('请选择有效时间'); return; } if(s===e){ showToast('开始和结束不能相同'); return; } var ps=cfg().silentPeriods||[]; ps.push(s+'-'+e); cfg().silentPeriods=ps; saveCfg(); el('care-silent-add-area').style.display='none'; el('care-silent-add-btn').style.display='inline-block'; renderSilent(); showToast('已添加静默时段'); });
    }

    function bindRange(idMin, idMax, kMin, kMax, lo, hi){ var a=el(idMin), b=el(idMax); if(!a||!b) return; function save(){ var mn=Number(a.value), mx=Number(b.value); if(isNaN(mn)) mn=lo; if(isNaN(mx)) mx=hi; mn=Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,mn)); mx=Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,mx)); if(mn>mx){ mx=mn; } a.value=mn; b.value=mx; cfg()[kMin]=mn; cfg()[kMax]=mx; saveCfg(); } a.addEventListener('change', save); b.addEventListener('change', save); }
    function bindTimeRange(idS, idE, kS, kE){ var a=el(idS), b=el(idE); if(!a||!b) return; function save(){ if(a.value&&b.value&&a.value>b.value){ b.value=a.value; } cfg()[kS]=a.value; cfg()[kE]=b.value; saveCfg(); } a.addEventListener('change', save); b.addEventListener('change', save); }

    function renderTemplates(){ var c=cfg(); if(!Array.isArray(c.templates)||!c.templates.length){ c.templates=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_TEMPLATES)); saveCfg(); } var box=el('care-template-container'); if(!box) return; var html=''; c.templates.forEach(function(t,idx){ html+=`<div class='care-template-item'><span class='tpl-label'>${t.label||'选项'}</span><textarea class='tpl-input' data-idx='${idx}'>${(t.text||'').replace(/</g,'<')}</textarea><div class='tpl-actions'><button class='tpl-reset' data-idx='${idx}'>↺</button><button class='tpl-del' data-idx='${idx}'>✕</button></div></div>`; }); box.innerHTML=html; box.querySelectorAll('.tpl-input').forEach(function(inp){ inp.addEventListener('change', function(){ var i=Number(this.dataset.idx); var t=cfg().templates; if(t[i]) t[i].text=this.value; saveCfg(); }); }); box.querySelectorAll('.tpl-del').forEach(function(btn){ btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ var i=Number(this.dataset.idx); var t=cfg().templates; if(t.length<=1){ showToast('至少保留一个选项'); return; } t.splice(i,1); saveCfg(); renderTemplates(); }); }); box.querySelectorAll('.tpl-reset').forEach(function(btn){ btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ var i=Number(this.dataset.idx); var def=DEFAULT_TEMPLATES[i]; var t=cfg().templates; if(def&&t[i]){ t[i].label=def.label; t[i].text=def.text; saveCfg(); renderTemplates(); showToast('已恢复此项默认'); } }); }); }

    function renderSilent(){ var ps=cfg().silentPeriods||[]; var box=el('care-silent-list'); if(!box) return; if(!ps.length){ box.innerHTML=`<div style='color:#A89888;font-size:11px;padding:2px 0;'>暂无静默时段</div>`; return; } var html=''; ps.forEach(function(p,idx){ var a=String(p).split('-'); html+=`<div class='care-silent-item'><span class='time-range'>${a[0]||''} — ${a[1]||''}</span><button class='del-btn' data-idx='${idx}'>✕</button></div>`; }); box.innerHTML=html; box.querySelectorAll('.del-btn').forEach(function(btn){ btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ var i=Number(this.dataset.idx); var p2=cfg().silentPeriods||[]; p2.splice(i,1); cfg().silentPeriods=p2; saveCfg(); renderSilent(); }); }); }

    function renderLogs(){ var l=logs(); var box=el('care-log-list'); if(!box) return; if(!l.length){ box.innerHTML=`<div style='text-align:center;color:#A89888;padding:16px;font-size:12px;'>暂无记录</div>`; return; } var html=''; for(var i=0;i<Math.min(l.length,50);i++){ var lg=l[i]; var cls=lg.status==='triggered'?'triggered':(lg.status==='paused'?'paused':'skipped'); var icon=lg.status==='triggered'?'✅':(lg.status==='paused'?'⏸️':'⏭️'); html+=`<div class='care-log-item'><span class='log-time'>${fmtFull(lg.time)}</span><span class='log-text'>${lg.text}</span><span class='log-status ${cls}'>${icon}</span></div>`; } box.innerHTML=html; }

    function renderSent(){ var s=sent(); var box=el('care-sent-list'); if(!box) return; if(!s.length){ box.innerHTML=`<div style='text-align:center;color:#A89888;padding:16px;font-size:12px;'>暂无发送记录</div>`; return; } var html=''; for(var i=0;i<Math.min(s.length,20);i++){ var it=s[i]; if(!it||!it.time) continue; var typeLabel=it.type==='morning'?'🌅 早晨':'💓 普通'; var tzLabel='UTC'+(it.tz>=0?'+':'')+it.tz; html+=`<div class='care-sent-item'><div class='sent-time'>${fmtFull(it.time)} ｜ ${typeLabel} ｜ ${tzLabel}</div><div class='sent-content'>${String(it.content||'').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/\n/g,'<br>')}</div></div>`; } box.innerHTML=html; }

    function updateUI(){ var c=cfg(), s=st(); var setv=function(id,v){ var e=el(id); if(e&&e.value!==undefined) e.value=v; }; var tg=el('care-toggle'); if(tg) tg.className='care-switch'+(c.enabled?' on':''); setv('care-max-miss',c.maxMiss); setv('care-interval-min',c.intervalMin); setv('care-interval-max',c.intervalMax); setv('care-prob-min',c.probMin); setv('care-prob-max',c.probMax); setv('care-morning-start',c.morningStart); setv('care-morning-end',c.morningEnd); setv('care-morning-prob-min',c.morningProbMin); setv('care-morning-prob-max',c.morningProbMax); setv('care-wake-text',c.wakeText); setv('care-typing-window',c.typingWindow); setv('care-tz-his',c.tzHis); setv('care-title',c.title); var row=el('care-weekday-row'); if(row){ var btns=row.querySelectorAll('.care-wd'); for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){ var d=Number(btns[i].getAttribute('data-d')); btns[i].className='care-wd'+((c.workdays||[]).indexOf(d)!==-1?' on':''); } } renderTemplates(); renderSilent(); if(el('care-last-trigger')) el('care-last-trigger').textContent=s.lastTrigger?fmtFull(s.lastTrigger):'—'; if(el('care-miss-count')) el('care-miss-count').textContent=(s.missCount||0)+' 次'+(s.paused?'（已暂停）':''); if(el('care-next-check')){ if(c.enabled&&s.nextCheck>Date.now()) el('care-next-check').textContent=Math.round((s.nextCheck-Date.now())/60000)+' 分钟后'; else el('care-next-check').textContent=c.enabled?'即将检查':'—'; } if(el('care-idle')) el('care-idle').textContent=idleText(s.lastUserMsgTime); }

    // ===== 启动 =====
    (async function(){
      await loadAll();
      build();
      updateUI();
      var s=st();
      if(!s.lastUserMsgTime){ await syncMsgTrackers(); }
      if(cfg().enabled){ var s2=st(); if(!s2.nextCheck || s2.nextCheck<Date.now()){ s2.nextCheck=Date.now()+rnd(cfg().intervalMin,cfg().intervalMax)*60000; saveState(); } }
      setInterval(build, 3000);
      setInterval(tick, 60000);
      setTimeout(tick, 4000);
      console.log('[小闹钟 v3.0] 已启动');
    })();

  } catch(e){ console.error('[小闹钟 v3.0] 启动失败', e); }
})();
</script>
